Interface Documentation.Builder<B extends Documentation.Builder<B>>

Enclosing interface:
Documentation
public static interface Documentation.Builder<B extends Documentation.Builder<B>>
Describes a builder for creating a Documentation object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    B
    addData(Documentable documentable)
    Adds additional data related to the thing represented by the documentation.
    B
    addExample(String example)
    Adds an example to the documentation.
    B
    addExamples(String... examples)
    Adds one or more examples to the documentation.
    B
    addExamples(Collection<String> examples)
    Adds one or more examples to the documentation.
    B
    addKeyword(String keyword)
    Adds a keyword to the documentation.
    B
    addKeywords(String... keywords)
    Adds one or more keywords to the documentation.
    B
    addKeywords(Collection<String> keywords)
    Adds one or more keywords to the documentation.
    B
    addRequirement(String requirement)
    Adds a requirement to the documentation.
    B
    addRequirements(String... requirements)
    Adds one or more requirements to the documentation.
    B
    addRequirements(Collection<String> requirements)
    Adds one or more requirements to the documentation.
    B
    addSince(String since)
    Adds an entry describing a version when the thing represented by the documentation was added or changed.
    B
    addSince(String... since)
    Adds one or more entries describing a version when the thing represented by the documentation was added or changed.
    B
    addSince(Collection<String> since)
    Adds one or more entries describing a version when the thing represented by the documentation was added or changed.
    void
    applyTo(Documentation.Builder<?> builder)
    Applies the values of this builder onto builder.
    Documentation
    build()
     
    B
    clearData()
    Clears all added additional data.
    B
    clearExamples()
    Clears all added examples.
    B
    clearKeywords()
    Clears all added keywords.
    B
    clearRequirements()
    Clears all added requirements.
    B
    clearSince()
    Clears all added since entries.
    B
    deprecated()
    Marks that the thing being represented by the documentation is considered deprecated.
    B
    description(String description)
    Sets the description to use for the documentation.
    B
    id(@Nullable String id)
    Sets the identifier to use for the documentation.
    B
    name(String name)
    Sets the name to use for the documentation.
    B
    origin(Origin origin)
    Sets the origin to use for the documentation.

  • Method Details

    • origin

      @Contract(value="_ -> this", mutates="this") B origin(Origin origin)
      Sets the origin to use for the documentation.
      Parameters:
      origin - The origin to use.
      Returns:
      This builder.
      See Also:
      • Documentation.origin()

    • id

      @Contract(value="_ -> this", mutates="this") B id(@Nullable @Nullable String id)
      Sets the identifier to use for the documentation.
      Parameters:
      id - The identifier to use. Use null to unset it.
      Returns:
      This builder.
      See Also:
      • Documentation.id()

    • name

      @Contract(value="_ -> this", mutates="this") B name(String name)
      Sets the name to use for the documentation.
      Parameters:
      name - The name to use.
      Returns:
      This builder.

      • Documentation.name()

      Returns:
      This builder.

      This builder.

      examples - The examples to add.

      This builder.

      @Contract(value="-> this", mutates="this") B clearExamples()
      Clears all added examples.
      Returns:
      This builder.

      @Contract(value="_ -> this", mutates="this") B addSince(String since)
      Adds an entry describing a version when the thing represented by the documentation was added or changed.
      Parameters:
      since - The entry to add.
      Returns:
      This builder.

      This builder.

    • addData

      B addData(Documentable documentable)
      Adds additional data related to the thing represented by the documentation.
      Parameters:
      documentable - The additional data to add.
      Returns:
      This builder.

      B clearData()
      Clears all added additional data.
      Returns:
      This builder.
      See Also:
      • Documentation.additionalData()

    • build

      @Contract("-> new") Documentation build()
      Returns:
      A Documentation object representing the values set on this builder.

    • applyTo

      void applyTo(Documentation.Builder<?> builder)
      Applies the values of this builder onto builder.
      Parameters:
      builder - The builder to apply values onto.
